name: MotionTrans
source_datasets: own VR human manipulation + robot data
downloadable: derived-only (HF dataset; NL instructions generated locally)
license: code MIT; HF dataset has no license tag
redistribution: unclear: HF dataset carries no license tag; treat as restricted
suitability: descriptive-only: a roughly 30-task set with locally LLM-augmented instructions, not a standalone clusterable language corpus
focus_en: Transfers motion-level manipulation skills from VR-collected human demonstrations to robots through a human-to-robot transformation pipeline and weighted human-robot co-training.
focus_cn: 通过人到机器人的转换流程与加权的人-机器人协同训练，将 VR 采集的人类演示中的运动级技能迁移到机器人。
datapath_en: MotionTrans collects human demonstrations through a VR system that records synchronized 3D hand trajectories and egocentric headset video, alongside teleoperated robot data. A transformation pipeline maps the human hand pose and egocentric observations into the robot observation-action space so both share one representation, and a weighted multi-task strategy co-trains a single policy across roughly 30 human and robot tasks. The released artifacts are robot policies and a HuggingFace dataset; natural-language task instructions are generated locally by paraphrasing task descriptions with an LLM rather than distributed as a standalone corpus.
datapath_cn: MotionTrans 通过 VR 系统采集人类演示，记录同步的 3D 手部轨迹与第一人称头显视频，并配以遥操作的机器人数据。转换流程将人类手部姿态与第一人称观测映射到机器人的观测-动作空间，使两者共享同一表示；加权多任务策略在约 30 个人类与机器人任务上协同训练单一策略。发布的产物是机器人策略与一个 HuggingFace 数据集；自然语言任务指令由本地用大语言模型改写任务描述生成，而非作为独立语料分发。
flow_en: VR human demos: 3D hand pose + egocentric video
transform human data into robot observation-action space
flow_cn: VR 人类演示：3D 手部姿态 + 第一人称视频
将人类数据转换到机器人观测-动作空间
本地大语言模型任务指令增广
加权的人-机器人协同训练
no_corpus_en: MotionTrans centers on motion transfer, not language annotation. It reuses short task descriptions and expands them locally with an LLM for its VLA variant rather than authoring a curated instruction corpus, and its HuggingFace dataset carries no license tag. Because the instruction text is produced on the fly and not released as an independent, redistributable set, this atlas documents MotionTrans descriptively rather than clustering downloaded strings.
no_corpus_cn: MotionTrans 的核心是运动迁移，而非语言标注。它复用简短的任务描述并在本地用大语言模型扩写（用于其 VLA 变体），而非编制经过整理的指令语料，且其 HuggingFace 数据集没有许可标签。由于指令文本是即时生成、并未作为独立可再分发的集合发布，本图谱以描述性方式记录 MotionTrans，而非对下载的字符串进行聚类。
example_caption_en: MotionTrans collects egocentric VR human demonstrations; the project page and video show the headset-view capture and robot transfer.
example_caption_cn: MotionTrans 采集第一人称 VR 人类演示；项目主页与视频展示头显视角采集与机器人迁移。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2509.17759, github.com/michaelyuancb/motiontrans (MIT), motiontrans.github.io, and huggingface.co/datasets/michaelyuanqwq/motiontrans (no license tag). Instruction text is LLM-augmented locally, not released as a standalone corpus.
citation: Yuan et al., MotionTrans: Human VR Data Enable Motion-Level Learning for Robotic Manipulation Policies, arXiv:2509.17759 (2025).
